title: L66 - work_service_level_objectives
description: Service Level Objective (SLO) definitions and thresholds per service (L62). Defines expected performance, availability, and quality metrics. Breaches feed L67 work_service_breaches for automated remediation.

service_id.description: FK to L62 work_factory_services (CASCADE on delete). SLOs deleted when service deleted.

metric_name.description: Name of the metric being tracked (corresponds to L65 profile fields)

target_value.description: Target value for this metric (e.g., 0.99 for 99% success rate, 5.0 for 5 seconds p95 duration)

threshold_warning.description: Warning threshold — triggers alert but not incident (e.g., 0.95 for success_rate)

threshold_critical.description: Critical threshold — triggers incident and remediation (e.g., 0.90 for success_rate). Creates L67 breach record.

measurement_window_hours.description: Time window for measuring this SLO (e.g., 1 hour, 24 hours, 168 hours for weekly)

evaluation_frequency_minutes.description: How often to check this SLO (e.g., 5 minutes, 15 minutes, 60 minutes)

comparison_operator.description: How to compare actual vs target. For success_rate: >= target. For duration: <= target.

status.description: Whether this SLO is currently being monitored

priority.description: SLO priority — affects breach severity scoring

description.description: Human-readable description of this SLO and why it matters

remediation_runbook_url.description: URL to runbook for remediation procedures when SLO breached

notification_channels.description: Where to send alerts for breaches (email, Slack, PagerDuty, etc.)

channel_address.description: Email address, webhook URL, or channel ID

severity_levels.description: Which severity levels trigger this notification (default: both)

last_breach_at.description: When this SLO was last breached (ISO8601 timestamp, nullable if never breached)

last_evaluation_at.description: When this SLO was last checked (ISO8601 timestamp)

breach_count_24h.description: Number of breaches in the last 24 hours (for trend analysis)

breach_count_7d.description: Number of breaches in the last 7 days

created_by.description: Identifier of creator (service owner or platform admin)
